Package neqsim.process.operations

package neqsim.process.operations
Operational study helpers that connect P&ID semantics, plant data, automation addresses, and NeqSim process simulations.

The package provides orchestration classes only. It reuses measurement devices for field data, ProcessAutomation for variable access, existing process logic actions for valve manipulation, and ProcessSystem for steady-state and transient execution.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process
     
    neqsim.process.operations.envelope
    Operational envelope evaluation built on existing equipment capacity constraints.
  • Class
    Description
    ControllerTuningResult
    Quantitative result from a controller tuning or performance screening study.
    ControllerTuningStudy
    Utility methods for screening controller tuning from simulated or historian time series.
    OperationalAction
    Describes one plant-agnostic operation to apply to a NeqSim process model.
    OperationalAction.ActionType
    Supported operational action types.
    OperationalEvidencePackage
    Builds an operational evidence package from document-derived tags, field data, scenarios, and NeqSim bottleneck analysis.
    OperationalScenario
    Ordered set of plant-agnostic operational actions for a NeqSim process model.
    OperationalScenario.Builder
    Builder for OperationalScenario.
    OperationalScenarioResult
    Result from executing an OperationalScenario.
    OperationalScenarioRunner
    Executes plant-agnostic operational scenarios on a NeqSim ProcessSystem.
    OperationalTagBinding
    Defines how a logical P&ID or operating tag maps to NeqSim and plant data.
    OperationalTagBinding.Builder
    Builder for OperationalTagBinding.
    OperationalTagMap
    Plant-agnostic map from logical operating tags to NeqSim measurement devices and automation addresses.
    PipeSectionAnalyzer
    Analyzes pipe sections that may not be part of the main process model.
    PipeSectionAnalyzer.FluidSpec
    Holds top-level fluid specification defaults.
    WaterHammerStudy
    Runs fast water-hammer and liquid-hammer screening studies from process, STID, and tag data.
    WaterHammerStudy.PipeGeometry
    Normalized equivalent pipe geometry for a screening water-hammer study.
